input.label: Country/Currency

choice.value: "123.51.223.4" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(TWD) AS "USD/TWD" avg(TWDAUD) AS "AUD/TWD" avg(TWDEUR) AS "EUR/TWD" avg(TWDGBP) AS "GBP/TWD" avg(TWDCAD) AS "CAD/TWD" avg(TWDJPY) AS "TWD/JPY" avg(TWDCNY) AS "CNY/TWD"

"1.66.0.0" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(JPY) AS "USD/JPY" avg(JPYAUD) AS "AUD/JPY" avg(JPYEUR) AS "EUR/JPY" avg(JPYGBP) AS "GBP/JPY" avg(JPYCAD) AS "CAD/JPY" avg(JPYTWD) AS "TWD/JPY" avg(JPYCNY) AS "CNY/JPY"

"27.50.48.0" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(AUD) AS "AUD/USD" avg(AUDJPY) AS "AUD/JPY" avg(AUDEUR) AS "EUR/AUD" avg(AUDGBP) AS "GBP/AUD" avg(AUDCAD) AS "AUD/CAD" avg(AUDTWD) AS "AUD/TWD" avg(AUDCNY) AS "AUD/CNY"

"5.1.122.255" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(EUR) AS "EUR/USD" avg(EURJPY) AS "EUR/JPY" avg(EURAUD) AS "EUR/AUD" avg(EURGBP) AS "GBP/EUR" avg(EURCAD) AS "EUR/CAD" avg(EURTWD) AS "EUR/TWD" avg(EURCNY) AS "EUR/CNY"

"2.22.227.255" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(GBP) AS "GBP/USD" avg(GBPJPY) AS "GBP/JPY" avg(GBPAUD) AS "GBP/AUD" avg(GBPEUR) AS "GBP/EUR" avg(GBPCAD) AS "GBP/CAD" avg(GBPTWD) AS "GBP/TWD" avg(GBPCNY) AS "GBP/CNY"
"23.68.0.0" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(CNY) AS "USD/CNY" avg(JPY) AS "USD/JPY" avg(AUD) AS "AUD/USD" avg(EUR) AS "EUR/USD" avg(GBP) AS "GBP/USD" avg(CAD) AS "USD/CAD" avg(TWD) AS "USD/TWD"

"24.75.176.0" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(CAD) AS "USD/CAD" avg(CADJPY) AS "CAD/JPY" avg(CADAUD) AS "AUD/CAD" avg(CADEUR) AS "EUR/CAD" avg(CADGBP) AS "GBP/CAD" avg(CADTWD) AS "CAD/TWD" avg(CADCNY) AS "CAD/CNY"

"27.128.0.0" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(CNY) AS "USD/CNY" avg(CNYJPY) AS "CNY/JPY" avg(CNYAUD) AS "AUD/CNY" avg(CNYEUR) AS "EUR/CNY" avg(CNYGBP) AS "GBP/CNY" avg(CNYTWD) AS "CNY/TWD" avg(CNYCAD) AS "CAD/CNY"

input.default: "123.51.223.4" | iplocation countryip | geostats avg(TWD) AS "USD/TWD" avg(TWDAUD) AS "AUD/TWD" avg(TWDEUR) AS "EUR/TWD" avg(TWDGBP) AS "GBP/TWD" avg(TWDCAD) AS "CAD/TWD" avg(TWDJPY) AS "TWD/JPY" avg(TWDCNY) AS "CNY/TWD"
